_doc: Declarative RO-Crate root. 'identity' documents what the engine derives from the dcc + id_namespace tables (via C2M2ToROCrateMapper._resolve_metadata) and supplies the ARK naan. 'context_vars' documents the author/publisher/date defaults. 'fields' is what the engine actually writes onto the root node (ROCrateMetadataElem). Each field lists its source branches and the engine tries them in precedence order (override > meta > const > template > computed), falling through on a null result -- so a field can chain, e.g. name = override('$name_arg') -> meta('project_name') -> template(dcc default). {meta:<key>} reads the resolved identity (incl. project_name/project_description/project_identifier from the top-level project row); {const:...}; {template:...} interpolates {dcc_label},{slug},{populated_list},{total_tables},{empty_count},...; {computed:<primitive>}. A CLI flag named by 'override' (e.g. $name_arg = --name) always wins.

description.template: RO-Crate packaging of the CFDE C2M2 Frictionless datapackage for the {dcc_label} dataset. It preserves the C2M2 relational tables (TSV), the datapackage schema, and the SQLite relational index verbatim, and overlays schema.org/EVI provenance plus file-level links back to the source data. The relational contract (primary/foreign keys) travels as cfde:* extension fields so the C2M2 relational model can be reconstituted.

cfde:emptyTablesNote.template: {empty_count} of the {total_tables} C2M2 tables are empty for this instance and are omitted from @graph; their full schema (fields/PK/FK) is preserved in C2M2_datapackage.json. Populated tables: {populated_list}.
